posts.text:
This is the way.

👍👍👍🇺🇸🇺🇸🇺🇸


Tyler Bowyer (@tylerbowyer)

While podcasters argue on X over generally predisposed animosity towards one another, (not really about news of the day,) our team is registering voters and chasing ballots to protect the nation’s largest utility company in a swing state. 

Losing it would make it dramatically harder to win the Presidency again. 

Proud of our team!



— https://nitter.net/tylerbowyer/status/2033706533557833837#m

.@NYMag ran a piece on women who regret having kids. People misunderstand the intended audience. The piece isn't for women who had kids and regret it. It's for the growing number of women desperate to convince themselves not to regret that they didn't.

Video

Tucker enjoys all this intrigue about supposed connections to Qatar, Saudi Arabia, now Iran. Meanwhile, not a single foreign government even wants to pretend to have flipped me. 

Liechtenstein, my ringer is on!

Video

I know some people didn't like Conan's TPUSA joke. I loved it. The TPUSA Halftime Show mattered enough that the Oscars had to talk about it. In politics, the only thing worse than being talked about is not being talked about.

Video

The honor is all mine!


Jeremy Wayne Tate (@JeremyTate41)

This is real folks! 

I am honored to welcome ⁦@michaeljknowles⁩ to the CLT Board of Academic Advisors! Michael Knowles is a graduate of Yale University and is one of the most influential political and cultural commentators alive today.





— https://nitter.net/JeremyTate41/status/2033563341373817025#m

One of my favorite conspiracy theories was that Banksy was Damien Hirst. Alas!


New York Post (@nypost)

Guerrilla artist Banksy finally unmasked - along with the remarkable way he hid in plain sight trib.al/HyJ2fEc





— https://nitter.net/nypost/status/2033266915397800359#m
